title: solanum nigrum subsp. pilcomayense
intro: Solanum nigrum subsp. pilcomayense, also known as black nightshade, is a subspecies of the nightshade plant (Solanum nigrum) native to the Americas. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Solanum nigrum subsp. pilcomayense include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of arthritis, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
